description: Auto-AI is a branded AI workspace for human-feeling conversations, memory, file context, voice input, web research, and Android access.

application.name: Auto-AI

routes.title: Auto-AI | AutoAI Workspace for AI Chat, Memory and Files
routes.description: Auto-AI, also searched as AutoAI and Auto AI, is an AI workspace with memory, uploads, voice input, web research, streaming chat, and Android access.

routes.title: Download Auto-AI Android APK | AutoAI Mobile App
routes.description: Download the Auto-AI Android APK and use AutoAI mobile with the same account, memory, chat history, uploads, settings, and web research.

routes.title: Auto-AI Login | Access Your AutoAI Workspace

routes.title: Create an Auto-AI Account | Start Using Auto AI

routes.title: Auto-AI Admin Login | AutoAI Control Center
